title: Hearts of Humanity
writer: Edward T. Lowe Jr., Olga Printzlau
actors: Jean Hersholt, Jackie Searl, J. Farrell MacDonald
plot: Genial Irish NYC policeman Tom O'Hara is looking forward to the arrival of his wife and their young son, Shandy from Ireland. Several days before the ship is to dock, O'Hara gets a radiogram informing him that his wife has died at...
